name: diff-viewer
title: Diff Viewer
description: A lightweight compound diff code block for landing pages with responsive before/after panels, inherited inline marks, and customizable syntax highlighting rules.

props.name: children
props.description: Compose with DiffPanel children to define the before and after panes

props.name: filename
props.description: Optional file label rendered in the header, like a code block title

props.name: highlightRules
props.description: Tokenizer rules used to automatically syntax-highlight text children inside DiffLine

props.name: panes
props.description: The number of panes your diff will have. Useful when creating inline diff-view

props.name: className
props.description: Custom classes applied to the outer diff viewer container

subComponents.name: DiffPanel
subComponents.description: One side of the diff. On mobile the panels stack vertically; from md upwards they render side by side.

props.name: children
props.description: Diff lines for a single side of the comparison

props.name: side
props.description: Logical panel side used for composition and semantics

props.name: className
props.description: Custom classes for the panel wrapper

subComponents.name: DiffLine
subComponents.description: A single diff row. Automatically highlights text children and provides add/del state to nested DiffMark elements.

props.name: children
props.description: Line content. Plain text is tokenized automatically; nested DiffMark stays precise.

props.name: type
props.description: Controls line chrome, sign, and inherited mark styling

props.name: number
props.description: Optional line number displayed in the gutter

props.name: highlightRules
props.description: Optional per-line override for syntax highlighting rules

props.name: disableHighlighting
props.description: Disables automatic syntax highlighting for that line

props.name: className
props.description: Custom classes for the line wrapper

subComponents.name: DiffMark
subComponents.description: Inline changed fragment. Inherits add/del state from the parent DiffLine and lets you color the inner text directly with className.

props.name: children
props.description: The exact changed text or nested content to emphasize

props.name: className
props.description: Classes applied to the inner text inside the highlighted mark

props.name: markClassName
props.description: Optional classes for the outer highlighted wrapper
